title: Spaghetti Carbonara
ingredients: Salt and black pepper to taste
instructions: Cook spaghetti according to package directions.
While pasta is cooking, fry pancetta in a pan until crisp.
In a bowl, whisk eggs and cheese.
Drain pasta and add to the pan with pancetta. Toss to combine.
Remove from heat and stir in egg and cheese mixture. The heat from the pasta will cook the eggs.
Season with salt and pepper and serve immediately.

title: Beef Tacos
ingredients: Toppings: shredded lettuce, diced tomatoes, shredded cheese, sour cream
instructions: In a large skillet, cook ground beef over medium-high heat until no longer pink. Drain off fat.
Stir in taco seasoning and water. Bring to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Warm taco shells according to package directions.
Fill shells with beef mixture and top with your favorite toppings.

title: Mac and Cheese
instructions: Cook macaroni according to package directions. Drain.
In a large saucepan, melt butter over medium heat. Stir in flour to form a roux. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Gradually whisk in milk. Bring to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Remove from heat and stir in cheese until melted. Season with salt and pepper.
Add cooked macaroni and stir to combine.

title: Ramen Noodle Soup
ingredients: Optional add-ins: soft-boiled egg, sliced green onions, cooked chicken or tofu
instructions: In a small pot, bring broth to a boil.
Add ramen noodles and cook for 3 minutes, or until tender.
Stir in the seasoning packet that came with the noodles.
Pour into a bowl and top with your favorite add-ins.

title: Chicken Noodle Soup
instructions: In a large pot, bring chicken broth to a boil.
Add carrots and celery and cook for 5 minutes, or until slightly tender.
Stir in egg noodles and cook for 6-8 minutes, or until tender.
Add shredded chicken and season with salt and pepper.
Serve hot.

title: Baked Salmon
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
Place salmon on a baking sheet lined with foil.
Drizzle with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Top with lemon slices.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the salmon is cooked through.

title: Chicken Alfredo
ingredients: 1 chicken breast, cut into bite-sized pieces
instructions: Cook fettuccine according to package directions. Drain.
In a large skillet, melt butter over medium-high heat. Add chicken and cook until no longer pink.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute more.
Stir in heavy cream and bring to a simmer. Cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Stir in Parmesan cheese and season with salt and pepper.
Add cooked fettuccine and toss to combine.

title: Beef Stir-Fry
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, honey, and cornstarch.
In a large skillet or wok, heat sesame oil over high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned. Remove from skillet.
Add vegetables to the skillet and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until tender-crisp.
Return beef to the skillet and stir in the soy sauce mixture.
Cook for 1-2 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Serve over rice.

title: Vegetable Curry
ingredients: 2 cups mixed vegetables (e.g., potatoes, carrots, peas, green beans)
instructions: In a large pot or Dutch oven, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute more.
Stir in curry paste and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Stir in coconut milk and bring to a simmer.
Add vegetables and cook for 15-20 minutes, or until tender.
Serve over rice.

title: Lentil Soup
ingredients: 1 cup brown or green lentils, rinsed
instructions: In a large pot or Dutch oven, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onion, carrots, and celery and cook until softened, about 10 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute more.
Stir in lentils, vegetable broth, and thyme. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 45-60 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.

title: Chicken Parmesan
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
In a shallow dish, combine breadcrumbs and Parmesan cheese.
Dip each chicken breast in the beaten egg, then dredge in the breadcrumb mixture.
Place chicken in a baking dish and top with marinara sauce and mozzarella cheese.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the cheese is bubbly.

title: Shepherd's Pie
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
In a large skillet, cook ground meat and onion over medium-high heat until the meat is browned. Drain off fat.
Stir in carrots, peas, beef broth, and Worcestershire sauce. Bring to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes.
Pour the meat mixture into a baking dish.
Top with mashed potatoes.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the potatoes are golden brown.

title: Meatloaf
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
In a large bowl, combine beef, egg, onion, milk, and breadcrumbs. Shape into a loaf and place in a baking dish.
In a small bowl, combine ketchup and brown sugar. Spread over the meatloaf.
Bake for 1 hour, or until cooked through.

title: Chili
ingredients: 1 can (15 ounces) kidney beans, rinsed and drained
instructions: In a large pot or Dutch oven, cook ground beef and onion over medium-high heat until the beef is browned. Drain off fat.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute more.
Stir in kidney beans, diced tomatoes, tomato sauce, and chili powder.
Bring to a simmer and cook for at least 30 minutes, or up to several hours.

title: Pot Roast
instructions: Season roast with salt and pepper.
In a large pot or Dutch oven, brown the roast on all sides over medium-high heat.
Add onion, carrots, celery, and beef broth. Bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 3-4 hours, or until the roast is tender.

title: Lasagna
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
Cook lasagna noodles according to package directions. Drain.
In a large skillet, cook ground beef over medium-high heat until browned. Drain off fat. Stir in pasta sauce.
In a small bowl, combine ricotta cheese, egg, and Parmesan cheese.
To assemble, spread a thin layer of meat sauce in a baking dish. Layer with noodles, ricotta mixture, and mozzarella cheese. Repeat layers. Top with remaining meat sauce and mozzarella cheese.
Bake for 30-40 minutes, or until bubbly.

title: Fish and Chips
ingredients: 1 lb cod fillets, cut into 4 pieces
instructions: In a large pot or deep fryer, heat oil to 375°F (190°C).
Fry potatoes until golden brown. Drain on a paper towel-lined plate.
In a shallow dish, combine flour, baking powder, and salt. In another shallow dish, place the beaten egg. In a third shallow dish, pour the beer.
Dredge each fish fillet in flour, then dip in the egg, then in the beer.
Fry fish for 4-5 minutes per side, or until golden brown and cooked through.
Serve with fries.
